description_long: This is a large, imposing bank building with a classic neoclassical architectural style, featuring a prominent triangular pediment and a row of tall, cylindrical columns at the front. The facade is adorned with the word 'BANK' in large, gold letters above the main entrance, which is centrally located and flanked by the columns. The structure has a wide, sloped roof and a rectangular footprint, with the columns extending along the front and partially down the sides. The base and column capitals are accented with gold, adding a sense of prestige and formality. The building appears to be constructed primarily from stone or concrete, with metallic and painted details. There are no visible windows or additional signage, and the rear and sides are plain, emphasizing the grand, formal front.
description: A grand neoclassical bank building with a triangular pediment, tall columns, and gold 'BANK' signage above the main entrance. The structure is stone-like with gold accents and a wide, sloped roof.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, gold 'BANK' signage, and the full row of columns with gold accents.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying a plain wall with columns along the back, no signage or entrance visible.
description_view_2: Angled view highlighting the sloped roof, side columns, and the depth of the building; entrance and signage are not visible.
description_view_3: Opposite rear view showing the back columns and plain wall, similar to view 1, with no entrance or signage.
attribute_signage: Large gold letters spelling 'BANK' above the main entrance on the front facade.
attribute_entrance_design: Single central doorway, rectangular, framed by columns, likely solid material with no visible windows or decorative door elements.
